title: Amitie BUILDING - Nguyen Thi Minh Khai
desc:
Looking for a private office in Ho Chi Minh City that grows with your team?
Our fully serviced offices offer a workspace with flexible lease terms, dedicated support, and access to shared amenities.
open:
Monday to Friday: 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM
Saturday: 8:00 AM – 12:00 PM
Closed on Sundays and public holidays.
services: Traditional Offices, Serviced Offices, Virtual Offices, Meeting rooms

title: Amitie Business Center - pasteur
desc: A vibrant and strategic address (formerly District 3), ideal for teams looking for flexible, move-in ready office solutions in a collaborative business environment.

title: Amitie signature - phu my hung tower
desc:
W Signature offers premium private suites and executive-level amenities designed for leaders and growing teams.
With fully furnished offices, hospitality-inspired service, and seamless move-in options, this flagship location sets a new benchmark for modern workspaces in Ho Chi Minh City.
